# Yarrasys Skills

> An umbrella collection of open-source agent skills for Claude Code and the broader AI-agent
> ecosystem. Each skill lives under `skills/<name>/` with its own SKILL.md and is installable
> individually via the Skills CLI: `npx skills add yarrasys/skills@<name>`. The repo also doubles
> as a Claude Code **plugin marketplace** — some skills ship a plugin wrapper that adds enforced
> hooks, MCP tools, and slash commands on top of the skill.

## Skills

### kdbx — KeePassXC credentials skill

> Manages per-project, per-environment credentials in key-file-only KeePassXC `.kdbx` vaults
> (KDBX4 + Argon2). Replaces `.env` as the source of truth for secrets, API keys, and tokens, and
> injects them into commands without printing them into the transcript, logs, or shell history.
> Built for AI coding agents: the agent handles entry paths and variable names only — it never
> authors or observes a secret value.

- [SKILL.md](https://github.com/yarrasys/skills/blob/main/skills/kdbx/SKILL.md): agent-facing skill definition — when to use, invocation, the 13 operations, the agent/human role boundary, security do/don'ts.
- [Skill README](https://github.com/yarrasys/skills/blob/main/skills/kdbx/README.md): overview, install, quickstart, comparison.
- [references/schema.md](https://github.com/yarrasys/skills/blob/main/skills/kdbx/references/schema.md): the `.keepassxc.json` pointer schema and entry-path grammar.
- [references/security.md](https://github.com/yarrasys/skills/blob/main/skills/kdbx/references/security.md): threat model, `run` trust boundary, rotation and leak runbooks.
- [references/fallback.md](https://github.com/yarrasys/skills/blob/main/skills/kdbx/references/fallback.md): read-only `keepassxc-cli` commands for environments without uv.

Operations: `init · set · get · list · delete · mv · run · export · import · check · envs · rekey · install-launcher`.

Roles: agents read/use secrets (`run`/`get`/`list`/`check`/`envs`/`init`); writes (`set`/`delete`/`mv`/`import`/`rekey`) and value-exposure (`get --reveal`/`--clip`, `export`) are a human role. The plugin's `PreToolUse` hook enforces this; the bare skill states it as a contract.

Install (skill): `npx skills add yarrasys/skills@kdbx` · Requires [uv](https://docs.astral.sh/uv/);
the engine `pykeepass` (GPL-3.0) is fetched at runtime, never bundled.

Install (plugin): `/plugin marketplace add yarrasys/skills` then `/plugin install kdbx@yarrasys-skills` — adds the enforced role-guard + leak-guard hook, a safe MCP server (no value-crossing tools), and `/kdbx:*` commands.

## Repository

- [README](https://github.com/yarrasys/skills/blob/main/README.md): the collection index.
- [CONTRIBUTING](https://github.com/yarrasys/skills/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md) · [AGENTS.md](https://github.com/yarrasys/skills/blob/main/AGENTS.md) (guidance for AI agents working in this repo).
- Per-skill design specs and plans live under each skill, e.g. [skills/kdbx/docs/](https://github.com/yarrasys/skills/tree/main/skills/kdbx/docs/superpowers).
